title: rhinanthus minor var. elatior
intro:
Rhinanthus minor var. elatior, also known as the taller greater rew, is a flowering plant and a variety of the yellow rattle, a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by attaching to the roots of other plants.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems.

The health benefits of Rhinanthus minor var. elatior include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote the production of saliva, which may aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.

Rhinanthus minor var. elatior can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a holistic approach to health and wellness.
